allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('code:', d.get\('code'\)\); print\('courses count:', len\(d.get\('data',[]\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('data'\), list\) else 'NOT ARRAY'\); print\('first course keys:', list\(d['data'][0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\('data'\) else 'none'\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) stats = d.get\('data', []\) print\('statDate type:', type\(stats[0]['statDate']\).__name__ if stats else 'none'\) print\('statDate value:', stats[0].get\('statDate'\) if stats else 'none'\) print\('income value:', stats[0].get\('income'\) if stats else 'none'\) print\('income type:', type\(stats[0].get\('income'\)\).__name__ if stats else 'none'\) print\('count:', len\(stats\)\) ")
Bash(du -sh packageCourse packageOrder packageProfile packageTeacher pages pagesTeacher custom-tab-bar components assets)
